title: Unable to Create Webhook - Event Type Not Found
excerpt: I am currently trying to create a webhook using the API, but I am encountering an issue. I am receiving an error message that states, “Webhook event type not found.” I have verified that I am using the correct event type…

posts.author: Tamil (Arasi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am currently trying to create a webhook using the API, but I am encountering an issue. I am receiving an error message that states, “Webhook event type not found.” I have verified that I am using the correct event type according to the documentation, but the error persists.

Screenshot 2025-02-13 1403401080×695 79.4 KB
